homepage.hero.subtitle.message: Isang command lang para i-translate ang inyong locale files. Bawat translation method — Google Translate, LLMs, custom APIs, coached pipelines — ay isang config option. Gamitin kung ano ang epektibo para sa bawat language.

homepage.stats.tests.description: Stats bar label for test count

homepage.stats.dependencies.description: Stats bar label for dependency count

homepage.stats.scriptConverters.description: Stats bar label for script converter count

homepage.stats.languageRegisters.description: Stats bar label for language register count

homepage.quickExample.title.message: I-mix ang methods per language pair

homepage.quickExample.description.message: Ang bawat source→target pair ay may sariling translation method, model, at quality configuration. Gamitin kung ano ang epektibo para sa bawat language — hindi one-size-fits-all.

homepage.comparison.title.message: Hindi lang isa pang TMS platform

homepage.comparison.description.message: Ang Crowdin, Phrase, at Locize ay mga cloud platforms na nangangailangan ng accounts, dashboards, at monthly fees. Ang Rosetta ay isang CLI tool na nag-rurun mismo sa project niyo — walang accounts, walang dashboards, at walang vendor lock-in.

homepage.arena.titleLine1.message: Tingin niyo ba kayo ang may pinakamagandang method

homepage.arena.description.message: 7,000+ languages. ~130 lang ang may machine translation. Ang natitira ay isa pang unsolved problem — at isang open invitation. Bine-benchmark ng evaluation harness ng rosetta ang kahit anong method gamit ang fingerprinted at reproducible scoring. Tinu-track ng leaderboard ang bawat submission.

homepage.arena.calloutLine1.message: Isa itong unsolved problem kung saan pwedeng mag-contribute ang kahit sino sa mundo.

homepage.arena.calloutLine2.message: Bumuo ng method. I-score ito. I-share pabalik.

homepage.leaderboard.subtitle.message: Top translation methods na naka-rank base sa chrF++ score.

homepage.seo.titleSuffix.description: SEO title suffix for the homepage

homepage.seo.description.message: Isang i18n framework kung saan ang bawat translation method ay isang config option. Google Translate, LLMs, custom pipelines — isang command lang, may per-pair control, at quality-gated.
homepage.seo.description.description: SEO meta description for the homepage

homepage.features.oneCommand.description.message: I-auto-detect ang inyong locale files, format, at target languages. I-translate lang kung ano ang nagbago. I-skip ang mga hindi.

homepage.features.perPairMethods.descrip.message: Google Translate para sa French, isang LLM para sa Japanese, isang coached plugin para sa Plains Cree — lahat sa iisang config.

homepage.features.registersCoaching.desc.message: I-steer ang LLM gamit ang per-language tone instructions. Formal Sie-form para sa German, Taglish code-switching para sa Filipino, warrior's honor para sa Klingon.

homepage.features.contentAware.descripti.message: Naka-shield ang code blocks, shortcodes, interpolation variables, at raw HTML habang nagta-translate. Hindi makikita ng LLM ang code ninyo.

homepage.features.zeroDependencies.descr.message: Node.js built-ins lang. Walang SDKs, walang native modules, walang build step. Gumagana kahit saan nagra-run ang Node 20+.

homepage.features.qualityGate.descriptio.message: Bina-validate ang bawat translation bago i-write. Ang wrong-script output, source echoes, length inflation, at placeholder corruption ay nahuhuli at nire-reject.

homepage.useCases.saas.description.message: I-translate ang inyong Next.js, Hugo, o React app sa 30+ languages na may per-pair quality control.

homepage.useCases.saas.linkText.description: Use case link text: SaaS Internationalization

homepage.useCases.pipeline.title.description: Use case title: Build a Custom Pipeline

homepage.useCases.pipeline.description.message: I-chain ang LLMs kasama ang FST validators, dictionaries, at post-processors. I-package ito bilang isang plugin.
homepage.useCases.pipeline.description.description: Use case description: Build a Custom Pipeline

homepage.useCases.pipeline.linkText.description: Use case link text: Build a Custom Pipeline

homepage.useCases.preservation.descripti.message: Coached LLM translation para sa mga languages na walang API coverage — Indigenous, endangered, o constructed.

homepage.useCases.preservation.linkText.description: Use case link text: Language Preservation

homepage.arena.cards.plugTest.title.description: Arena card title: Plug and Test

homepage.arena.cards.plugTest.descriptio.message: I-run ang inyong method laban sa standardized benchmarks. chrF++, exact match, FST acceptance — lahat ay computed gamit ang parehong harness.
homepage.arena.cards.plugTest.descriptio.description: Arena card description: Plug and Test

homepage.arena.cards.plugTest.linkText.description: Arena card link text: Plug and Test

homepage.arena.cards.claimScore.title.description: Arena card title: Claim Your Score

homepage.arena.cards.claimScore.descript.message: Bawat submission ay naka-fingerprint sa isang Git commit at naka-score laban sa parehong dataset. Mag-open ng PR para mag-submit.
homepage.arena.cards.claimScore.descript.description: Arena card description: Claim Your Score

homepage.arena.cards.claimScore.linkText.description: Arena card link text: Claim Your Score

homepage.arena.cards.respectData.title.description: Arena card title: Respect the Data

homepage.arena.cards.respectData.descrip.message: Ang mga Indigenous languages ay pagmamay-ari ng kanilang communities. Sinu-support ng rosetta ang OCAP, CARE, at Māori Data Sovereignty principles.
homepage.arena.cards.respectData.descrip.description: Arena card description: Respect the Data

homepage.arena.cards.respectData.linkTex.description: Arena card link text: Respect the Data
